other_observers: N/A; Dave Leatherman, the finder, posted birds location 2/13/2012. Believe from his description same bird.
specific_location: 200 m south of CR108 0.7 miles east of CR49 in a field.
description: Overall white with dark gray barring. Top of head and nape were gray giving a dark appearance to these areas. White facial disks. Barred back, chest and belly with grayish tone. Barring was heavy, but not as black as some pictures I have seen.Behaviors: Just sittig and watching on the ground, turning head periodically. Fairly quiet during 15 minute observationCall: N/APlumage: Believe juvenile female
